steps.title: Enter both data sets as lists
steps.content: This is a direct Desmos list question. Put data set X in one list and data set Y in another, then compare the two means.

steps.title: Compare the results
steps.content: Desmos gives $\operatorname{mean}(x_1)=9$ and $\operatorname{mean}(y_1)=12.6$. The added value $27$ is much larger than the original mean, so it pulls the mean of Y upward.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Since $9<12.6$, the mean of data set X is less than the mean of data set Y. That matches choice B.
